notes: native-only path bypasses UI/canonical/template adapter entrypoints
FEBio CLI/Studio confirmation remains required for solver run validation

x.positive: from cell center toward the pipette/barrel side
x.negative: from pipette mouth toward cell interior

y.positive: one side of the thin 3D section
y.negative: opposite side of the thin 3D section

pressure.negativePressureEffect: intended to pull toward +x, into the pipette/barrel side

pressureDiagnostics.negativePressureEffect: intended to pull toward +x, into the pipette/barrel side

cellDish.status: diagnostic-only / disabled until refined cell-dish mesh
cellDish.inactiveReason: Correct opposed cell-dish winding activates the contact but the current coarse debug mesh produces a negative jacobian during lift; keep surfaces and diagnostics, omit solver contact.

notes: pressure load is sourced directly from native case loads.suctionPressure

aspiration.name: pipette_aspiration_length
aspiration.definition: Clamp to >=0 the projected distance from the pipette mouth plane to the most inward aspirated nucleus/cytoplasm node.
